channel.title: IOS | Android app
channel.description:
Hi, Newbie here in conversation frameworks. Can I convert WP pages to IOS/Android apps? I’m not interested in PWAs for my specific needs.
<!--
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->

item.title: IOS | Android app
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Hey @rsrimal I’m afraid Frontity has nothing to do with iOS/Android Apps. In any case, yes, you can use WordPress as the backend for your native mobile Apps using the REST API as the data source.

There are some specific solutions for that, for example: https://apppresser.com/

Read full topic

item.title: IOS | Android app
item.dc:creator: rsrimal
item.description:
Hi,
Newbie here in conversation frameworks.
Can I convert WP pages to IOS/Android apps? I’m not interested in PWAs for my specific needs.
